steps.title: Identify what 'duration' requires
steps.content: To emphasize duration means to show how long the relationship has lasted. The notes provide 1989 as the start date, so the answer must establish the timespan from 1989 to now.

steps.title: Find which choice shows the timespan
steps.content: Choice B uses “since 1989” with present perfect tense to establish the relationship's duration from 1989 to now. The other three either focus on the concept's history, geographic location, or comparisons to other cities—none establish this pair's duration. This accomplishes the student's goal of emphasizing duration. That matches choice B — B is correct.
